tasks.title: P0 — Kanban-board opzetten (cyanluna.skills)
tasks.description: Set up a kanban board per the cyanluna.skills repo. Han chose to vendor the 5 skills into .claude/skills/; remaining board-UI/token setup is local to Han.

tasks.title: In-app kanban-bord (debug → kanban + terugknop) + items uit backlog/plan
tasks.description: Add a button to open a native in-app kanban board via debug → kanban with a back button, sourced from a committed kanban.json generated from BACKLOG + IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.
tasks.source: BACKLOG.md ### In-app kanban-bord (debug → kanban + terugknop) + items uit backlog/plan

tasks.title: Generator setter in de bladmuziek — playback / generation / generation advanced
tasks.description: Three in-staff generator setters (playback, generation, generation advanced) per staff incl. a chords balk, wired to InstrumentSettings/chordSettings. Rebuilt in carousel style.
tasks.source: BACKLOG.md ### Generator setter in de bladmuziek — playback / generation / generation advanced

tasks.title: Bug — geen geluid na vaak van instrument wisselen
tasks.description: After changing the instrument many times no sound is heard; suspected smplr re-creation leak / dead AudioContext nodes in useInstruments.js.
tasks.source: BACKLOG.md ### 🐞 Bug — geen geluid na vaak van instrument wisselen

tasks.title: Bug — tuplet slot/length mismatch
tasks.description: [3:2]q w gets a phantom quarter-rest; tuplet generation corrupts note planning so durations/offsets do not align with measure length. Likely needs the events refactor.

tasks.title: Bug — chord melody komt uit generator i.p.v. song-definitie
tasks.description: HBD chord progression follows the generator strategy instead of the chords supplied in happyBirthday.json during playback/regen.
tasks.source: BACKLOG.md ### HBD/Song Bug: chord melody komt uit generator i.p.v. song-definitie

tasks.title: Song-load bugs (start halverwege, etc.)
tasks.description: Generating a few bars then loading Happy Birthday starts playback halfway through the song; assorted song-load defects.

tasks.title: Bug — Kwartnoot-tuplets verkeerde maatindeling in weergave
tasks.description: Quarter-note tuplets sometimes misplace notes in the sheet music due to wrong note attribution across measures.
tasks.source: BACKLOG.md ### Bug: Kwartnoot-tuplets — verkeerde maatindeling in weergave

tasks.title: Bug — Span onjuist berekend voor tuplets
tasks.description: Melodic span is computed incorrectly inside tuplets; 8va span limit is violated by tuplet notes (e.g. a5 f4 a6).
tasks.source: BACKLOG.md ### Bug: Span onjuist berekend voor tuplets

tasks.title: Bug — Verkeerde noot bij passing chords (geparkeerd)
tasks.description: Accidental/note mistake in progressions with passing chords; parked awaiting a reproducible example.
tasks.source: BACKLOG.md ### Bug: Verkeerde noot gegenereerd bij passing chords

tasks.title: Geparkeerd batch — transpositie-curve, two-octave range, preset-tween, range polish
tasks.description: Items Han parked: non-linear tangens transposition curve, two-octave C2→C6 range with octave clefs, carousel preset-click tween-to-value, and range-setter polish.

tasks.title: Repeat after me — lang nummer in stukken kappen voor herhalingsblokken
tasks.description: Call-and-response practice mode: chop a long song into chunks (e.g. 2 bars), teacher plays, player plays back, advance. Touches Sequencer repeat/segmentation.
tasks.source: BACKLOG.md ### Repeat after me — lang nummer in stukken kappen voor herhalingsblokken

tasks.title: Transpositie-setter revisie — compacte dubbele verticale carousel
tasks.description: Two coupled vertical half-step carousels on treble/bass staff (concert names + sheet notes on a non-linear curve); the non-linear primitive is also proposed for the range setter. Core wired; tangens curve still open.
tasks.source: BACKLOG.md ### Transpositie-setter revisie — compacte dubbele verticale carousel

tasks.description: Limit or fix beam angle to horizontal for percussion (no melodic up/down), improving tuplet/dual-voice readability.

tasks.title: Rusten — beter balanceren
tasks.description: Too many repeated quarter rests in generated melodies; want better distribution / less predictability, possibly tied to variability.

tasks.description: Allow some tuplet slots to be rests at higher variability instead of always filling all slots.

tasks.title: Nootgroepering — geen splitsing over groepsgrenzen
tasks.description: Do not split a note across full note groups when it fits a group (e.g. a whole note instead of two tied halves; dotted half on beat 2).

tasks.description: Follow-up work on the redesigned pagination animation (transitionPlanner + event-driven scheduler, 3 variants, JIT generation).

tasks.description: Phase-2-adjacent entanglement left open: series-boundary regen + JIT inside Sequencer.start(); deeper randomizeScaleAndGenerate orchestration (display-note map duplicated ~3x).

tasks.description: Indefinite-repeat encoding is split between Infinity and -1; normalization pending.

tasks.title: Tech-debt — metronome stale on song load
tasks.description: Metronome stays stale on song load (wrong meter, ignores fermata); root of HBD extra-count issue.

tasks.description: Range setter R1–R4: per-note cascade, keyboard-trigger, bound-flash bug, yellow→white boundaries.

tasks.description: Deprecate the redundant legacy 'settings' overlay once PLAYBACK setter lands; close test gaps (Sequencer.js, useSheetMusicHighlight pure helpers); icons8 assets blocked in PR #31.
